about: A passionate Software Developer 🚀 | Open Source enthusiast 📝 | Maintainer 👷
bio: I’m an engineering student with a strong passion for building impactful software solutions. In my leisure time, I actively contribute to open-source projects and engage with developer communities like Stack Overflow to both learn and assist others. I have hands-on experience with technologies such as Python, Node.js, Flutter, and Java, and have built several full-stack and cross-platform applications. Most of my projects are open-sourced and available on my GitHub, while a few are maintained as private repositories due to ongoing development or confidentiality.

1.name: KCET SmartPass
1.description: KCET SmartPass is a campus pass management app for students to apply and track leave, outpass, and hostel pass approvals digitally.(In Development Stage)

2.name: Med4Free
2.description: Med4Free is a donation-based platform that connects medicine donors with patients in need, enabling free access to unused, life-saving medicines.

3.name: Clean Rail
3.description: Clean Rail is a digital inspection system for Indian Railways that streamlines station and train cleanliness audits with section-wise scoring, remarks, and automated PDF reports.

4.name: Brain Tumor Detection
4.tech_stack_used: TensorFlow, CNN, OpenCV, and MRI Brain Tumor Dataset.
4.description: Brain Tumor Detection is a deep learning-based application that analyzes MRI scans to accurately identify and classify brain tumors, assisting in early diagnosis and treatment planning.

5.name: Dermo Detect
5.tech_stack_used: Python, TensorFlow, CNN, OpenCV, and HAM10000 dataset
5.description: Dermo Detect is a skin disease classification app that uses deep learning to identify dermatological conditions from images with high accuracy.(In Private Repo)

6.name: Res-Q-Link
6.description: A disaster relief and donation platform aimed at connecting donors with victims in real time to streamline aid distribution during emergencies in Tamil Nadu.

7.name: Clara Miniatures
7.description: A modern e-commerce platform for women's fashion accessories, enabling seamless product discovery, secure purchasing, order tracking, and efficient inventory management through a responsive and user-friendly interface.

8.name: M.S. Madhan Furniture
8.description: Designed and developed a tailored business management solution for Windows and mobile platforms, enabling efficient management of inventory, customer interactions, sales orders, and operational workflows, improving productivity and business efficiency.
